page_metadata.biotools__summary: A fast and memory-efficient method for haplotype assembly from long gapless reads, like those produced by SMRT sequencing technologies (PacBio RS II) and Oxford Nanopore flow cell technologies (MinION).
page_metadata.bioschemas__summary: A fast and memory-efficient method for haplotype assembly from long gapless reads, like those produced by SMRT sequencing technologies (PacBio RS II) and Oxford Nanopore flow cell technologies (MinION).
